socialTrends.name: Rivian Automotive, Inc.
socialTrends.summary: Rivian was the talk of the retail crowd after smashing Q2 delivery targets and raising its 2026 outlook, sparking a wave of FOMO and optimistic autonomous EV strategy discussions.

socialTrends.name: Space Exploration Technologies Corp.
socialTrends.summary: Heavily trending ahead of July 7th, when it officially enters the Nasdaq-100 index. Investors are anticipating huge institutional tracking inflows following the largest IPO in history.

socialTrends.name: Rocket Lab USA, Inc.
socialTrends.summary: Discussions center around its new Neutron contract bookings, defense launches, and its recent entry into the Nasdaq-100, which has elevated the company to SpaceX's top direct public competitor.

socialTrends.name: AST SpaceMobile, Inc.
socialTrends.summary: Despite some price consolidation, the community remains extremely bullish on its fully operational BlueBird satellites and Japan's Rakuten joint venture, debating a massive discount to estimated fair value.

socialTrends.name: Palantir Technologies Inc.
socialTrends.summary: A high-profile upgrade to Buy by DA Davidson has sparked massive retail interest, highlighting Palantir's leading ontology position as an AI orchestrator.

socialTrends.name: Tesla, Inc.
socialTrends.summary: Bears dominated the narrative as Tesla's tripled capex plan ($25B) for autonomous driving and Optimus robots raises FCF concerns, exacerbated by new federal safety investigations.

socialTrends.name: Micron Technology, Inc.
socialTrends.summary: Hit by profit-taking and antitrust DRAM price-fixing allegations, despite reporting blowout quarterly earnings. Retail users are hotly debating whether this is a buy-the-dip opportunity or a cycle top.
